mano_cua.result_summary: Timeline 的 sticky section (Version 1.0) 与 navbar 重叠。sticky 元素的 top 值为 0，未考虑 navbar 高度(约 64-70px)，导致滚动时 sticky section 滑入 navbar 区域（y≈107 vs navbar y=83-130），z-index 层级关系错误
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Version 1.0 text starts at approximately y=107, which is right in the middle of the navbar area (y=83 to y=130). The sticky position's top value is set to 0 (not accounting for the navbar height), so when the sticky element reaches the top of the viewport, it slides behind the navbar. Error: 504 Gateway Time-out from mano API ended the session prematurely.
